esg_policy.value: ADP’s ESG policy is built around three pillars: environmental stewardship (including energy and greenhouse‑gas management, waste reduction and climate‑related risk mitigation), social responsibility (promoting inclusion, community engagement, employee well‑being and philanthropy), and strong governance (board ethics, compliance, data privacy and security).
